name: Aputure Space Light Diffuser for Nova LED Panels
description: The Aputure Space Light Diffuser is designed for the Nova P600c and P300c LED Panels and features a cylindrical design, which is achieved by mounting the light into a suspended circular-shaped frame.

features.Key Features:: For Nova P600c & P300c LED Panels | Omni-Directional Soft Light Diffuser | 360° Illumination | Adjustable Light Control Skirt | Circular Aperture | Collapsible Design | Includes Carry Bag
features.What's in The Box?: Aputure Space Light Diffuser for Nova LED Panels | Suspension Mount | Light Control Skirt | Carry Bag
